Information.Name: record
Information.Description: v=DMARC1; p=none; sp=none; rua=mailto:reportes@educarex.es; pct=100; adkim=s; aspf=s

Information.Name: Version
Information.Description: Identifies the record retrieved as a DMARC record. It must be the first tag in the list.

Information.Name: Policy
Information.Description: Policy to apply to email that fails the DMARC test. Valid values can be 'none', 'quarantine', or 'reject'.

Information.Name: Sub-domain Policy
Information.Description: Requested Mail Receiver policy for all subdomains. Valid values can be 'none', 'quarantine', or 'reject'.

Information.Name: Receivers
Information.Description: Addresses to which aggregate feedback is to be sent. Comma separated plain-text list of DMARC URIs.

Information.Name: Percentage
Information.Description: Percentage of messages from the Domain Owner's mail stream to which the DMARC policy is to be applied. Valid value is an integer between 0 to 100.

Information.Name: Alignment Mode DKIM
Information.Description: Indicates whether strict or relaxed DKIM Identifier Alignment mode is required by the Domain Owner. Valid values can be 'r' (relaxed) or 's' (strict mode).

Information.Name: Alignment Mode SPF
Information.Description: Indicates whether strict or relaxed SPF Identifier Alignment mode is required by the Domain Owner. Valid values can be 'r' (relaxed) or 's' (strict mode).
